symbols: dark background — the sober restraint of neoclassical portraiture
white cravat — social standing and intellectual dignity
direct gaze — personal authority and moral conviction
description: A half-length portrait of a middle-aged man against a dark reddish-brown background. He has dark wavy hair, a broad face with strong features, and a direct, penetrating gaze. He wears a dark coat over a high white cravat, with a small red decoration visible at his lapel. The lighting falls warmly on his face from the left, creating subtle chiaroscuro that models his features with characteristic Romantic intensity. The painting is rendered with Gericault's vigorous brushwork and psychological directness, capturing the sitter's air of intellectual gravity and political determination.

_meta.title: Presumed Portrait of Pierre Paul Royer-Collard
